en: It's Barney like you've never seen him He can't lie So we can finally get the answers we've always been wondering.
ja: 見たことないバーニーだよ。嘘がつけないから答えがやっと聞ける。
zhTW: 這是你從沒見過的巴尼。他沒辦法說謊，所以終於能得到答案。
vi: Day la Barney nhu ban chua tung thay. Anh ta khong the noi doi nen chung ta cuoi cung co duoc cau tra loi.

en: about Hey buddy It's everything you've ever wanted to know In one night four In.
ja: やあ。知りたかったこと全部。一晩で四。一家族で三。
zhTW: 嘿。你一直想知道的一切。一個晚上四個。一個家庭三個。
vi: Nay. La moi thu ban muon biet. Mot dem bon. Mot gia dinh ba.

en: one family three Yes but not while she was Secretary of State.
ko: 네, 하지만 그녀가 국무장관일 때는 아니었습니다.
ja: うん、でも彼女が国務長官の時じゃなかった。
zhTW: 是的，但不是在她擔任國務卿時。
vi: Co, nhung khong phai khi ba ay la Bo truong Ngoai giao.
